content: Phase A: electron-builder config'i production-grade güncelle
Phase B: GitHub Actions release.yml'i zenginleştir
Phase C: Linux üzerinde wine ile Windows build best-effort denemesi + scripts/wine-build-win.sh
Phase D: Linux'ta dist/linux-unpacked ile packaged smoke test (backend spawn + health + vault)
Regresyon: Backend Jest 387/387 PASS + Desktop Vitest 9/9 PASS + Smoke PASS korunmalı
